info.title: SmartSurvey API
info.description: SmartSurvey API provides access to survey data, from listing all surveys to getting all the responses for a survey. It supports managing surveys, responses, contact lists, invitations, tracking links, themes, webhooks, and more.

get.description: Get all the account users under your account

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page number

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of results you want up to 100

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Optional list of properties that you want to sort by

get.description: Get a single account user from your SmartSurvey account

parameters.name: account_user_id
parameters.description: The id of the user you want to retrieve

get.description: Get the account user information for the current api key
Gets all Api Keys with paging

parameters.name: page

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of results you want up to 100

parameters.name: include_subusers
parameters.description: Whether to include data for sub users as well as the current user

parameters.description: The Api Key id that you want to delete

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The id of the survey whose exports you are accessing

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: The id of the export you want to download

get.description:
Downloads the latest export for a survey as a file.
            
             Note: This endpoint has 10 seconds of caching on it to prevent customers polling this excessively. Ideally this should be called
             on an infrequent schedule corresponding to an export schedule but with at least 30 seconds allowance for caching to expire.

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The id of the survey whose exports you are accessing

get.description:
Downloads the latest export of a given type for a survey.
            
             Note: This endpoint has 10 seconds of caching on it to prevent customers polling this excessively. Ideally this should be called
             on an infrequent schedule corresponding to an export schedule but with at least 30 seconds allowance for caching to expire.

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The id of the survey whose exports you are accessing

parameters.name: reportType
parameters.description: The type of export you want to download

post.description: Do a find and replace on email addresses for all future one-off scheduled exports in the given survey

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The id of the survey whose exports you are accessing

post.description:
Sends out an invitation to a single recipient.
            
             Note that this is a premium endpoint and is not available on all plans. Contact your Account Manager or Support if you wish to use this endpoint but are not permitted to.

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose Invitation you are querying

parameters.name: invitationId
parameters.description: The invitation id that you are querying

404.description: Survey, Contact List or Invitation not found

post.description:
Sends out an invitation to 1 or more recipients.
            
             Note that this is a premium endpoint and is not available on all plans. Contact your Account Manager or Support if you wish to use this endpoint but are not permitted to.

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose Invitation you are querying

parameters.name: invitationId
parameters.description: The invitation id that you are querying

404.description: Survey, Contact List or Invitation not found

get.description: Gets all Survey Permissions for a survey with paging

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose permissions you are querying

post.description:
Adds new permissions for a user or edits existing permissions.
            
             If there are existing permissions, only those explicitly set in the request are modified

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose permissions you are deleting

404.description: Survey not found or target member id does not exist/is not part of your organisation

delete.description: Deletes all sharing permissions for the given survey

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose permissions you are deleting

delete.description: Deletes all permissions for the given member id for the given survey

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose permissions you are deleting

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: The id of the members whose permissions you are deleting

get.description: Gets all Responses with paging

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose Responses you are querying

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page number

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of results you want up to 100

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Optional list of properties that you want to sort by

parameters.name: completed
parameters.description: Whether to only include completed responses

parameters.name: translation_id
parameters.description: The translation for the results - defaults to English

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Unix timestamp to filter results after a date/time

parameters.name: until
parameters.description: Unix timestamp to filter results before a date/time

parameters.name: filter_id
parameters.description: Optional filter id for the results

parameters.name: tracking_link_id
parameters.description: Tracking link id to filter results

parameters.name: unique_id
parameters.description: Filter on the user unique id

parameters.name: include_labels
parameters.description: Whether to include question and page labels (reduces the size of the response)

get.description: Gets a single Response

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose Response you are querying

parameters.name: responseId
parameters.description: The Response id that you are querying

parameters.name: translation_id
parameters.description: The translation id to load - defaults to English

parameters.name: include_labels
parameters.description: Whether to include labels in the response - can increase the size of the payload significantly

delete.description: Delete the given Response by its id

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose Response you are querying

parameters.name: responseId
parameters.description: The Response id that you want to delete

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id of the survey to fetch

parameters.name: translation_id
parameters.description: The id of the translation you want the details in or 0 for the default

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id that you want to copy

delete.description: Deletes the given survey WITHOUT confirmation

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id that you want to delete

get.description: Gets the detailed information about a single survey

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id of the survey to fetch

parameters.name: translation_id
parameters.description: The id of the translation you want the details in or 0 for the default

patch.description: Manage the results sharing of the survey

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose results sharing you want to configure

patch.description:
Opens the survey, which opens only the default tracking link. If the survey is already open,
            nothing is changed.

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id of the survey you want to open

patch.description:
Closes the survey, meaning all tracking links are closed. If the survey is already closed,
            nothing is changed.

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id of the survey you want to close

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id of the survey you want to print

parameters.name: t
parameters.description:
The output type you want to print the survey as.

Options: 1: Word doc | 2: HTML | 3: PDF

parameters.name: st
parameters.description: The survey translation id to print the survey in.

parameters.name: dst
parameters.description: Whether to include the title of the survey. (default: true)

parameters.name: dsl
parameters.description: Whether to include the logo. (default: true)

parameters.name: qn
parameters.description: Whether to include question numbers. (default: true)

parameters.name: pn
parameters.description: Whether to include page numbers. (default: true)

parameters.name: pt
parameters.description: Whether to include page headings. (default: true)

parameters.name: pd
parameters.description: Whether to include page descriptions. (default: true)

parameters.name: pb
parameters.description: Whether to include page breaks. (default: true)

parameters.name: pqb
parameters.description: Whether to prevent breaking questions across pages. (default: true)

parameters.name: qf
parameters.description: Whether to strip HTML tags from all questions. (default: false)

parameters.name: of
parameters.description: Whether to strip HTML tags from all answer choices. (default: false)

parameters.name: stbg
parameters.description: The background color of the survey title. (default: #1170a8 - dark blue)

parameters.name: stc
parameters.description: The color of the survey title text. (default: #FFFFFF - white)

parameters.name: slbg
parameters.description: The background color of the survey logo. (default: #FFFFFF - white)

parameters.name: ptbg
parameters.description: The background color of the page title. (default: #424242 - dark gray/black)

parameters.name: ptc
parameters.description: The color of the page title text. (default: #FFFFFF - white)

200.description: Success - depending on specified type (t), returns either HTML content or a Word or PDF file stream.

get.description: Gets all tracking links for a survey with paging

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are querying

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page number

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of results you want up to 100

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Optional list of properties that you want to sort by

post.description: Inserts a new tracking link of the given type with an optional title

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id where you want to insert the new collector

get.description: Gets a detailed listing of a single tracking link

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are querying

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you are querying

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

put.description: Updates the given tracking link data (currently limited to title only)

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are updating

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you are updating

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

delete.description: Delete the given tracking link by its id

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are querying

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you want to delete

400.description: You cannot delete the default tracking link

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

put.description: Copy the given tracking link into a new tracking link with an optional specific title

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are copying

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you are copying from

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are opening

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you want to open

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are closing

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you want to close

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

patch.description: Attempts to update the link text of the given tracking link

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are changing

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you are changing the link text for

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

patch.description: Updates the autoclose date for the given tracking link

parameters.name: surveyId
parameters.description: The survey id whose links you are updating

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The tracking link id that you are updating the auto close date for

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The timestamp that you want to use for the new auto close date expressed as Unix Timestamp e.g. seconds from 01-01-1970. If it is not passed, the auto close is disabled.

404.description: Survey or Tracking Link not found

type.description:
A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when
dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type
(e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be
"about:blank".

status.description: The HTTP status code([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.ProblemDetails.description: A machine-readable format for specifying errors in HTTP API responses based on <see href="https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7807" />.

type.description:
A URI reference [RFC3986] that identifies the problem type. This specification encourages that, when
dereferenced, it provide human-readable documentation for the problem type
(e.g., using HTML [W3C.REC-html5-20141028]). When this member is not present, its value is assumed to be
"about:blank".

status.description: The HTTP status code([RFC7231], Section 6) generated by the origin server for this occurrence of the problem.

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem.

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem. It may or may not yield further information if dereferenced.

total.description: Gets or sets the total number of records.

id.description: The unique id for this account

type.description: The type of user

fullname.description: The account user's full name which is first name + last name

date_created.description: The date this account was created

surveys.description: The number of surveys this account owns

href.description: An API link to the details for this account

SmartSurvey.Public.API.Models.AccountUse.description: A response object for Account Users

code.description: A readable version of the status code e.g. "success", "created", "no_content"
